title: Operating Documentation
purpose: This is the directory containing all governing documentation pertaining to how agents operate within this environment combined with how the environment receives new additions and expands appropriately without fragmenting as those expansions happen.

contents.name: framework.md
contents.description: The architectural constitution — service contracts, communication standards, naming conventions, data ownership map, event routing, compliance checklist

contents.name: logic_mandates.md
contents.description: Operational protocols — Query System, Thread Management, Memory Protocols; governs per-prompt agent behavior

contents.name: machines_registry.json
contents.description: Authoritative machine registry — hardware specs, network info, SSH config, role, and status for every node in the fleet

contents.name: agent_registry.json
contents.description: Canonical agent catalog — machine assignment, autonomy level, version, status, launch command, memory graph paths

contents.name: service_registry.json
contents.description: Service registry — what is running where, ports, health endpoints, process type, and status

contents.name: {PROJECT_NAME}_project_dictionary.json
contents.description: Project glossary — shared vocabulary for terms, conventions, and concepts used across the system

contents.name: compliance_checker_template.md
contents.description: Pre-build checklist template — 10 questions to answer before writing any new component

contents.name: event_bus_template.md
contents.description: Event bus scaffold — event envelope format, type registry, subscriber registry, dispatcher config

contents.name: lifecycle_manager_template.md
contents.description: Lifecycle manager scaffold — launch_all.sh template, health check table, restart procedure

contents.name: {PROJECT_NAME}_project_dictionary.md
contents.description: Project dictionary markdown version — stub, in progress
